name: Ranyu
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dremora male serving as a torturer. Wears a near-complete set of Dremora Kynreeve Armor, missing the helm and gauntlets.
Race: Dremora
Personality Keywords: hostile, brutal, obedient
Role: Ranyu is a Dremora torturer working under Orthe in The Forbidden Grotto of Mankar Camoran's Paradise. He serves as one of three torturers alongside Orthe and Amkaos.
Location Information: Ranyu constantly patrols Orthe's section of the cave in the Forbidden Grotto, maintaining watch over the area.
Equipment: Ranyu wields a Dremora Longsword in combat and carries a leveled stealth potion (which may be a poison instead). As a Dremora, he possesses Resist Magic ability at Valkynaz level (50% resistance). He can cast one leveled Destruction spell, one leveled Alteration spell, and one Apprentice Destruction spell. He knows a major Summon spell but cannot cast it.
Behavior: Ranyu attacks on sight when encountered. When Eldamil creates a distraction, Ranyu attacks him alongside his fellow Dremora.
Personality - The Relentless Torturer: Ranyu performs his duties as a torturer under Orthe's command, constantly patrolling his assigned section of the cave. His immediate hostility toward intruders and willingness to attack Eldamil during the distraction shows someone who acts without hesitation when threats appear.
author: Bethesda
